# Mohammed Abdessetar Elyagoubi

> Software Engineer Java | OpenTelemetry Contributor | AI & Cybersecurity Enthusiast

## About Me

Software Engineer Java at Sofrecom (Orange Group subsidiary) in Rabat, Morocco. I build and operate production Java/Spring Boot microservices and modern web applications. 
I am a contributor to the OpenTelemetry Java SDK (CNCF), with a focus on reliability, concurrency, and system-level correctness.
With 3 Years Of Experience In Web Development. Passionate about AI, cybersecurity, and clean architecture.

## Selected Projects
- **OpenTelemetry Java SDK**: Contributor to CNCF. Bounded the JdkHttpSender thread pool to prevent unbounded thread creation and resource exhaustion.
- **Presence Card**: Self-hosted presence card showing now-playing music and activity as an animated SVG for GitHub profile README. (Go, SVG)
- **GitGuide**: VS Code extension enforcing Git best practices. (Node.js, TypeScript)
- **WeTalentify**: Automated recruitment and talent-matching platform. (Next.js, MongoDB, AI)
- **Winsight360**: Enterprise survey platform with reward mechanisms. (Next.js, MongoDB)
- **EcoShift**: Carbon footprint tracking platform (Hackathon winner). (Java, Spring Boot, Next.js)

## Core Technical Skills
- **Languages**: Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, PHP, SQL, C
- **Frameworks**: Spring Boot, JEE, Next.js, React, Angular, Tailwind CSS, Express
- **Cloud & DevOps**: Docker, CI/CD (GitLab CI, GitHub Actions), Cloud Foundry, AWS, GCP, Linux, Nginx, SonarQube
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, TimescaleDB, Redis, Supabase
- **Focus Areas**: Microservices, REST API design, observability (OpenTelemetry), LLM integration & fine-tuning, automation
